untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of gap conditions (upward gap opening vs lower gap open) which cannot be expressed with allowed operators and indicators. Gap detection requires comparing current open to previous close with a threshold concept not available in the operator set. Additionally, 'exit at next open' requires forward-looking logic not expressible in standard backtesting rules.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the pullback entry logic for short positions (price pulling back to prev_high or prev_close) and same-day exit concept, but the core gap detection mechanism and directional logic cannot be properly formalized without gap-specific indicators or conditional logic operators.
